message:
🌱 Add grpc: gRPC Python logging "All log messages before mission (#1498)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "grpc-38703-grpc-python-logging-all-log-messages-before-absl-initializelog-is-cal",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "grpc: gRPC Python logging \"All log messages before absl::InitializeLog() is called are written to STDERR\"",
+    "description": "gRPC Python logging \"All log messages before absl::InitializeLog() is called are written to STDERR\". This issue affects 17+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your grpc setup:\ngRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)\nCheck your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review grpc configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant grpc configuration:\ngRPC Core changed its logging system to use absl logging as per https://github.com/grpc/proposal/blob/master/L117-core-replace-gpr-logging-with-abseil-logging.md."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for gRPC Python logging \"All log messages before…",
+        "description": "Current approach to solving this:\n1. Add `abseil-cpp/absl/log/initialize.cc` as a dependency\n2. Call `absl::InitializeLog()` automatically to solve this problem for 99% of users\n3. For 1% that may be calling `absl::InitializeLog()` themselves, provide an easy way to opt-out of our automatic absl\n```yaml\n@sreenithi proposed an environment variable, a viable option too.\n\nFor posterity, here's how the absl double log init error looks like:\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm gRPC Python logging \"All log messages before… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Current approach to solving this:\n1. Add `abseil-cpp/absl/log/initialize.cc` as a dependency\n2. Call `absl::InitializeLog()` automatically to solve this problem for 99% of users\n3. For 1% that may be calling `absl::InitializeLog()` themselves, provide an easy way to opt-out of our automatic absl log initialization. \n\nSome ideas on absl log init opt-out for the 1%.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "@sreenithi proposed an environment variable, a viable option too.\n\nFor posterity, here's how the absl double log init error looks like:",
+        "Linking https://github.com/abseil/abseil-cpp/issues/1656\nHow can we comply mute `grpc`/`abseil`?\nIt spams until the Kernel crash.\n\nI get these satanic logs x1000 on TPU env:"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
